selection_rules: Used current data/canonical/entities.jsonl only for candidate record presence and source evidence.
Used current data/identity-overrides/merges.json to exclude aliases already merged and targets that are themselves merge aliases.
Used current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json to exclude entity do-not-merge hits in either pair direction.
Excluded alias==target pairs and stale aliases or targets missing from current canonical JSONL.
Excluded generic same-name candidates where local context can change identity, especially bare Community Board number labels without borough-specific canonical agreement.
Checked prior codex identity prep files for any selected alias_id and found no selected alias previously proposed.

command_evidence.command: pwd && git status --short && ls -l data/review_notes 2>/dev/null | tail -20
command_evidence.purpose: Confirmed repo path and observed a busy worktree before making a scoped review-note-only edit.
Inspected current merge override schema and current entity aliases.

command_evidence.command: jq '.pairs | type, (if type=="array" then .[0:5] else to_entries[0:5] end)' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
command_evidence.purpose: Inspected do-not-merge schema and entity pair structure.
Confirmed current canonical entity JSONL shape and record fields.
Confirmed prior identity prep sequence through batch144.
Checked recent artifact shape for compatibility.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<read-only duplicate grouping over data/canonical/entities.jsonl plus merges, do-not-merge, and prior prep guards>'
command_evidence.purpose: Generated candidate entity alias pairs from exact/normalized entity-name groups and filtered already-merged, target-chain, do-not-merge, stale, alias==target, and prior-prep collisions.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<read-only selected record inspection for names, aliases, descriptions, source_ids, and evidence_refs>'
command_evidence.purpose: Inspected selected alias and target records for local source-backed evidence.

Verified selected pairs are current canonical records, absent from current merges as aliases, targets are not merge aliases, alias!=target, absent from entity do-not-merge, and absent from prior Codex entity prep aliases.
Confirmed the requested artifact path did not already exist before writing.
